# MLSoundClassifier.ModelParameters.ValidationData.none

**Case**

An empty validation dataset that skips the model validation phase after training.

## Declaration

```swift
case none
```

## Designating validation data

- **MLSoundClassifier.ModelParameters.ValidationData.split(strategy:)**: A validation dataset derived by randomly selecting a portion of the sound classifier’s training dataset using the split strategy.
- **MLSoundClassifier.ModelParameters.ValidationData.dataSource(_:)**: A validation dataset represented by a data source.
- **MLSoundClassifier.ModelParameters.ValidationData.dictionary(_:)**: A validation dataset represented by a dictionary.

items.description: A validation dataset derived by randomly selecting a portion of the sound classifier’s training dataset using the split strategy.
